name: gallery
description: Express starter with a feature-flagged auth layer.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/middleware/auth.js && node --check src/routes/auth.js && node --check src/routes/index.js && node --check src/services/drivesService.js && node --check src/services/tokenService.js && node --check src/services/twoFactorService.js && node --check src/services/userService.js && node --check src/repositories/userRepository.js && node --check src/lib/prisma.js && node --check src/docs/openapi.js && node --check src/utils/response.js && node --check scripts/ensureSqliteFile.js
scripts.db:setup: prisma generate && node scripts/ensureSqliteFile.js && prisma db push
scripts.setup: npm run db:setup && npm run build
